content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks for LLM output and code refinement can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that outperforms single-perspective Self-Refine without adding extra training or supervision. This hybrid approach leverages the inconsistency between different solving perspectives as a source of natural self-feedback, rather than requiring the model to critique its own single initial output.
